info.name: Workday Extend Workday Custom Objects API
info.description:
APIs for defining and managing custom objects that extend Workday's data model to meet specific business needs. When new custom objects and business processes are built, a public REST API is automatically created for other developers and processes to use. Supports both single-instance and multi-instance custom objects attached to standard Workday business objects such as workers and organizations.

Contact Support:
 Name: Workday Developer Support

Workday Extend List custom object fields

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the custom object definition

request.description: Returns the collection of fields defined in the specified custom object definition, including field types, validation rules, and constraints.

item.name: Workday Extend Add a field to a custom object definition

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the custom object definition

request.description: Adds a new field to the custom object definition. The field will be available on all new and existing instances of this custom object type.

item.name: Workday Extend Retrieve a custom object definition

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the custom object definition

request.description: Returns the details of a specific custom object type definition including its full field schema, validation rules, and parent object associations.

item.name: Workday Extend Update a custom object definition

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the custom object definition

request.description: Updates an existing custom object type definition. Changes to the schema may affect existing custom object instances.

item.name: Workday Extend Delete a custom object definition

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the custom object definition

request.description: Deletes a custom object type definition. All instances of this custom object type must be deleted before the definition can be removed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Workday Extend Create a custom object definition

request.description: Creates a new custom object type definition with specified fields and attributes. The definition determines the schema for all instances of this custom object type.

item.name: workers
{workerId}
customObjects
{customObjectName}
Workday Extend Retrieve custom object data for a worker

variable.description: (Required) The unique Workday identifier of the worker
(Required) The name of the custom object type

request.description: Returns the custom object instance data attached to the specified worker. Supports both single-instance and multi-instance custom objects. For multi-instance objects, returns a collection of instances.

response.name: Successful response with custom object data

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Workday Extend Create or update custom object data for a worker

variable.description: (Required) The unique Workday identifier of the worker
(Required) The name of the custom object type

request.description: Creates or updates the custom object instance data attached to the specified worker. If the custom object does not exist for the worker, it is created. Otherwise, the existing data is updated with the provided values.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
